authority_map.resolution: Allowed because the user explicitly requested implementation of the approved harness plan.
authority_map.scope: Add new harness code, tests, and governed artifacts in the current workspace and execute local validations against localhost services.

constraints: Keep scope limited to src/mcp-server.ts, src/runtime-lock.ts, tests/mcp-server-shutdown.test.ts, tests/runtime-lock.test.ts, and governed artifacts.
Land on the current branch codex/scope-isolation-hardening and stage only the MCP stability scope.
Treat codex-mem retrieval evidence as unavailable in this session because the current desktop MCP transport is already closed.

decomposition_policy.strategy: Build the harness in sequence: stable inputs first, deterministic fixture and eval execution second, misses/comparison third, then validation and closeout.

definition_of_done.criterion: The MCP server exits after parent stdin closes and a replacement server safely takes over the lock for the same data dir.
Focused shutdown/lock tests and the full codex-mem test suite remain green.
definition_of_done.verification: cd /Users/chadsimon/code/codex-mem && npm test -- --run tests/mcp-server-shutdown.test.ts tests/runtime-lock.test.ts && npm test

definition_of_done.criterion: Replacement logic only terminates a positively identified codex-mem mcp-server and fails closed otherwise.
Governed artifacts capture command evidence and finalize approval for the MCP stability fix.
The fix remains isolated to MCP lifecycle files and tests so a focused revert restores the prior runtime behavior.

dependencies: Existing snapshot export helper at services/common/snapshot_transfer.py
Existing local eval runner at scripts/official_docs_eval.py
Local stack endpoints reachable at localhost for orchestrator-api, review-ops, mcp-server, slm-runtime, slm-serving, and executor admin

verification: export-corpus command writes bundle and split JSONL outputs
run-local-eval persists preflight, local_answers, judge-row-results, and judge-summary outputs

integration_map.touchpoint: scripts/build_reviewed_eval_misses.py semantics + harness comparison logic -> corrective exports and comparison artifacts

ambiguity_classification.statement: Deterministic extractive fixture generation must be heuristically derived from canonical article content because no existing full-corpus fixture generator exists.

authority_sensitive_decisions: Local workspace writes, local test execution, and localhost HTTP calls to the existing stack are authorized because the user explicitly requested implementation of this harness.
non_goals: Do not change database repair behavior.
Do not modify the Codex desktop app.
Do not clean unrelated dirty work already present on the current branch.
intent_contract.objective: Stabilize codex-mem MCP server lifecycle so Codex desktop sessions stop accumulating stale mcp-server child processes and same-data-dir replacement works deterministically.
success_criteria: The MCP server exits promptly when its stdio parent disconnects.
Starting a second mcp-server against the same data dir replaces the first one safely.
Runtime lock release is owner-safe and cannot delete a newer owner lock.
The fix is validated by focused shutdown/takeover tests, full npm test, and direct repro evidence.

migration_fallback_policy.manifest_rollback_path: Keep the harness additive and stop on governed or validation blockers rather than widening scope.

non_goals: Do not change database repair behavior.
Do not modify the Codex desktop app.
Do not clean unrelated dirty work already present on the current branch.
compiled_contract.objective: Stabilize codex-mem MCP server lifecycle so Codex desktop sessions stop accumulating stale mcp-server child processes and same-data-dir replacement works deterministically.

acceptance_checks: summary.json records exact counts and manifest hash
definition_of_done.behavior_outcome: The harness writes bundle.json, split JSONL corpus files, and summary.json from the active snapshot.
definition_of_done.rollback_or_fallback: If corpus export is blocked, stop before fixture generation and preserve existing runtime and snapshot state.
definition_of_done.verifier_acceptance_condition: Verifier sees exact active snapshot identity and stable exported counts in the harness corpus artifacts.

objective_requirements.description: Export the active deduped snapshot into stable reusable corpus artifacts with exact counts and manifest identity.

acceptance_checks: summary.json records row counts and source breakdown
the harness-local key is distinct from existing repo-wide normalized_question_hash semantics
definition_of_done.behavior_outcome: The harness writes existing_qa_index.jsonl and summary.json using a stronger harness-local normalized question key.
definition_of_done.rollback_or_fallback: If audit scanning over-collects malformed rows, skip those rows and preserve explicit exclusion reasons.
definition_of_done.verifier_acceptance_condition: Verifier can trace normalized question keys and source counts from the audit output.

objective_requirements.description: Audit existing Q/A rows from existing training and planning artifacts into a deterministic harness-local dedupe index.

acceptance_checks: harness_manifest.json includes fixture digest and snapshot id
preflight.json records required health and version checks
definition_of_done.behavior_outcome: The harness writes fixture artifacts, passes local preflight, and persists judged local eval results from run_live_eval_pack(...).
definition_of_done.rollback_or_fallback: If preflight cannot verify the local stack or snapshot identity, stop before eval persistence and do not interpret partial results.
definition_of_done.verifier_acceptance_condition: Verifier sees preflight evidence, fixture identity, and judged runner output for the same snapshot and run id.

objective_requirements.description: Generate a deterministic reviewed eval fixture from canonical article content and run it through the local answer stack with strict preflight gating.

acceptance_checks: rows are limited to model_hallucination, prompt_contract_drift, and abstention_mistake
rows are deduped by the harness-local question key
definition_of_done.behavior_outcome: The harness writes local_misses.jsonl and miss-training-export.jsonl for eligible failed rows only.
definition_of_done.rollback_or_fallback: If judged rows are incomplete or invalid, emit explicit skip reasons and do not call lifecycle materialization endpoints.
definition_of_done.verifier_acceptance_condition: Verifier can trace miss eligibility and dedupe decisions from persisted output and tests.

objective_requirements.description: Extract miss-only corrective training rows from judged results without mutating lifecycle state in the default harness flow.

acceptance_checks: comparison hard-fails on mismatched fixture digest or case count
newly_failed and newly_fixed are reported by stable case_id
definition_of_done.behavior_outcome: The harness writes a comparison artifact covering pass/fail, answer-mode, and grounding-status deltas with fixture guardrails.
definition_of_done.rollback_or_fallback: If fixture identities differ, stop comparison instead of emitting misleading deltas.
definition_of_done.verifier_acceptance_condition: Verifier can recompute the comparison basis from stored run manifests and row data.

objective_requirements.description: Compare two harness runs deterministically only when their fixture identity matches.

definition_of_done.behavior_outcome: The governed track contains validated plan and implementation artifacts plus finalize.json with ok=true.

objective_requirements.description: The implementation must close with auditable planning-gate artifacts, adaptive-memory evidence, and finalize ok=true.
